title: canarium schweinfurthii
intro: Canarium schweinfurthii, also known as the African nut tree or wild date palm, is a tropical tree native to tropical Africa that produces edible fruit with a soft, sweet pulp and a single seed. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, treat fever and rheumatism, and act as an anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Canarium schweinfurthii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Canarium schweinfurthii include tea, tincture, and powder, which can be used to make medicinal products such as capsules and tablets.
